business_goals.name: Safety advised before intake when warranted
business_goals.expression: If the caller mentioned injuries or an unsafe scene, the agent advised dialing 911 before continuing intake.

business_goals.name: No premium speculation
business_goals.expression: Agent never quoted, predicted, or speculated on a premium change.

business_goals.name: No fault assertion by agent
business_goals.expression: Agent did not tell the caller what their fault assessment was; only captured what the caller volunteered.
